vocab.example: Walking regularly is my primary way to combat the negative effects of a sedentary lifestyle caused by my office job.

vocab.meaning: bài tập cường độ cao/nặng nhọc
vocab.example: I wouldn't call it strenuous exercise, but walking ten thousand steps a day certainly keeps me active.
A long walk by the river is the perfect opportunity to unwind mentally after a taxing day.

vocab.meaning: vỉa hè/đường đi bộ (thường dùng trong bối cảnh hạ tầng)
vocab.example: The local council has recently improved the pavements, making it much more inviting to walk around the city.

vocab.meaning: dấu chân môi trường (tác động đến môi trường)
vocab.example: I try to walk as much as possible to reduce my carbon emissions and minimize my environmental footprint.

vocab.meaning: con đường ngoằn ngoèo, uốn lượn
vocab.example: There is a beautiful meandering path through the local woods that I follow every weekend.

vocab.meaning: hiệu ứng làm trẻ hóa/hồi phục sức sống
vocab.example: Being out in the fresh air has a truly rejuvenating effect on my overall well-being.

vocab.meaning: tuyến đường có phong cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: If I'm not in a hurry, I'll always take the scenic route home to enjoy the greenery.
The city center has been converted into a pedestrian zone, which makes walking so much more enjoyable and safe.
Daily walking has significantly boosted my physical stamina, allowing me to hike for hours without fatigue.
